name: Mcp Tunnels
description: Connect Claude to a private MCP server through an Anthropic MCP tunnel. Drives the Docker Compose quickstart end to end: certificates, proxy config, cloudflared, and a verifiable sample server.
longDescription: A single `/create-docker-mcp-tunnel` command drives Anthropic's MCP tunnel Docker Compose quickstart end to end: generates certificates, writes the proxy configuration, starts `cloudflared`, and brings up a verifiable sample MCP server. Lets Claude reach a private MCP server behind your firewall without exposing it publicly.
